emails.subject: Tenaska IV Feb 2001
emails.body: Tenaska IV Feb 2001 We do not have a demand fee for the Feb 2001 Tenaska IV sale, deal 384258. Can you please put this in so I can bill? From your spreadsheet, it looks like it needs to be $2,291,888.83, but you can verify. I subtracted the agency fee from the Tenaska IV receipt number, since we already have that booked. Megan
